problem_text_cn: 假设万有引力与距离一次方成正比（F∝r）。1. 建立行星闭合轨道三定律（类比开普勒三定律）；2. 施力者为若干固定质点，求受力质点的运动轨道。
problem_text_en: Assume that the gravitational force is proportional to the first power of distance（F∝r）。1. Establish the three laws of planetary closed orbits（by analogy with Kepler's three laws）；2. The force exertors are several fixed particles, find the motion trajectory of the force-receiving particle.
problem_solution_cn: （1）行星闭合轨道三定律：- 定律一：行星沿共心椭圆轨道绕太阳运动，太阳位于椭圆中心；- 定律二：太阳与行星的联线在相等时间内扫过相等面积（角动量守恒）；- 定律三：所有行星公转周期相同，T=2π/√(GM)（与行星参数无关）。（2）受力质点的轨道：- 固定质点组对受力质点的合力等效于质点组质心的引力（F=−GM_C m r_C/r_C）；- 运动轨道与单质点施力时相同，一般为椭圆（特殊情况退化为直线），椭圆中心为质点组质心。
problem_solution_en: （1）Three laws of planetary closed orbits：- Law 1: Planets move around the Sun along concentric elliptical orbits, and the Sun is located at the center of the ellipses；- Law 2: The line connecting the Sun and a planet sweeps out equal areas in equal times（angular momentum conservation）；- Law 3: The orbital periods of all planets are the same，T=2π/√(GM)（independent of planetary parameters）。（2）Trajectory of the force-receiving particle：- The resultant force of the fixed particle group on the force-receiving particle is equivalent to the gravitational force of the center of mass of the particle group（F=−GM_C m r_C/r_C）；- The motion trajectory is the same as when force is exerted by a single particle, generally an ellipse（degenerating into a straight line in special cases），with the center of the ellipse being the center of mass of the particle group。
problem_answer: 1. 行星闭合轨道三定律见解析；2. 受力质点的运动轨道一般为椭圆（中心为施力质点组质心）
